description: Product-owned built-in theme families. This file ships with each release and is overwritten on upgrade — operators must not customize it. Deployment-specific families/overrides belong in theme.json's 'families' block instead.

families.description: Built-in theme families keyed by family id (e.g. 'stained', 'glass'). Merged into the selectable catalog beneath operator-defined families from theme.json, so an operator entry with the same key overrides the built-in.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the family selector. Falls back to the family key.
